8	//
9	// Since Stage 3.8, `/` redirects to `/nodes/<id>` and concrete project views
10	// live under `/nodes/<nodeId>/projects/<projectId>/...`. TC-001 mirrors the
11	// fixture-based pattern used in navigation.spec.ts: mock GraphQL for
12	// NodeInfo / Projects / ProjectQueueSummary, navigate into the fixture
13	// project, and assert the shell + project entry points render.
14	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
15	const TC001_NODE = { id: 'node-abc', name: 'Test Node' }
16	const TC001_PROJECT_ID = 'proj-1'
17	const TC001_PROJECTS = [
18	  { id: TC001_PROJECT_ID, name: 'Project Alpha', path: '/repos/alpha' },
19	  { id: 'proj-2', name: 'Project Beta', path: '/repos/beta' }
20	]
21	const TC001_BASE_URL = `/nodes/${TC001_NODE.id}/projects/${TC001_PROJECT_ID}`

23	async function mockProjectOverview(page: Page) {
24	  await page.route('/graphql', async (route) => {
25	    const body = route.request().postDataJSON() as { query: string }
26	    if (body.query.includes('NodeInfo')) {
27	      await route.fulfill({
28	        status: 200,
29	        contentType: 'application/json',
30	        body: JSON.stringify({ data: { nodeInfo: TC001_NODE } })
31	      })
32	    } else if (body.query.includes('Projects')) {
33	      await route.fulfill({
34	        status: 200,
35	        contentType: 'application/json',
36	        body: JSON.stringify({
37	          data: { projects: { edges: TC001_PROJECTS.map((p) => ({ node: p })) } }
38	        })
39	      })
40	    } else if (body.query.includes('ProjectQueueSummary') || body.query.includes('queueSummary')) {
41	      await route.fulfill({
42	        status: 200,
43	        contentType: 'application/json',
44	        body: JSON.stringify({
45	          data: { queueSummary: { ready: 3, blocked: 1, inProgress: 0 } }
46	        })
47	      })
48	    } else {
49	      await route.fulfill({
50	        status: 200,
51	        contentType: 'application/json',
52	        body: JSON.stringify({ data: {} })
53	      })
54	    }
55	  })
56	}

112	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
113	// Fixture discovery — TC-002/003/005/007 navigate the live Go-server fixture
114	// harness and assert against the seeded documents/beads/personas/graph data.
115	// The harness derives node and project IDs from the temp workspace path so
116	// the IDs are stable per run but not predictable; resolve them at runtime
117	// from /api/projects + the GraphQL nodeInfo query.
118	// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
119	async function getFixtureIds(
120	  request: import('@playwright/test').APIRequestContext
121	): Promise<{ nodeId: string; projectId: string; nodeName: string }> {
122	  const nodeResp = await request.post('/graphql', {
123	    data: { query: '{ nodeInfo { id name } }' }
124	  })
125	  const nodeBody = (await nodeResp.json()) as {
126	    data: { nodeInfo: { id: string; name: string } }
127	  }
128	  const projectsResp = await request.get('/api/projects')
129	  const projects = (await projectsResp.json()) as Array<{
130	    id: string
131	    name: string
132	    path: string
133	  }>
134	  // The fixture harness boots ddx-server from a `mktemp -d -t ddx-e2e-XXXXXX`
135	  // workspace, so the fixture project's path/name is prefixed `ddx-e2e-`.
136	  // Other entries in /api/projects (carried over in the developer's persisted
137	  // server state) must not be picked up here — those would point the spec at
138	  // unrelated, developer-local data.
139	  const fixture = projects.find((p) => /(^|\/)ddx-e2e-/.test(p.path) || /^ddx-e2e-/.test(p.name))
140	  if (!fixture) {
141	    throw new Error(
142	      `fixture server has no ddx-e2e-* project registered (got: ${projects
143	        .map((p) => p.id)
144	        .join(', ')})`
145	    )
146	  }
147	  return {
148	    nodeId: nodeBody.data.nodeInfo.id,
149	    projectId: fixture.id,
150	    nodeName: nodeBody.data.nodeInfo.name
151	  }
152	}

154	function projectBase(ids: { nodeId: string; projectId: string }): string {
155	  return `/nodes/${ids.nodeId}/projects/${ids.projectId}`
156	}

5	export const PROJECT_RUNS_QUERY = gql`
6		query ProjectRuns(
7			$projectID: ID!
8			$first: Int
9			$after: String
10			$layer: RunLayer
11			$status: String
12			$harness: String
13		) {
14			runs(
15				projectID: $projectID
16				first: $first
17				after: $after
18				layer: $layer
19				status: $status
20				harness: $harness
21			) {
22				edges {
23					node {
24						id
25						layer
26						status
27						projectID
28						beadId
29						startedAt
30						durationMs
31						harness
32						queueInputs
33					}
34					cursor
35				}
36				pageInfo {
37					hasNextPage
38					endCursor
39				}
40				totalCount
41			}
42		}
43	`
44	
45	export interface RunNode {
46		id: string
47		layer: string
48		status: string
49		projectID: string | null
50		beadId: string | null
51		startedAt: string | null
52		durationMs: number | null
53		harness: string | null
54		queueInputs: string | null
55	}
56	
57	export interface RunEdge {
58		node: RunNode
59		cursor: string
60	}
61	
62	export interface PageInfo {
63		hasNextPage: boolean
64		endCursor: string | null
65	}
66	
67	export interface RunConnection {
68		edges: RunEdge[]
69		pageInfo: PageInfo
70		totalCount: number
71	}
72	
73	interface QueryResult {
74		runs: RunConnection
75	}
76	
77	export const PAGE_SIZE = 50
78	
79	export const load: PageLoad = async ({ params, url, fetch }) => {
80		const layer = url.searchParams.get('layer') ?? null
81		const status = url.searchParams.get('status') ?? null
82		const harness = url.searchParams.get('harness') ?? null
83	
84		const client = createClient(fetch as unknown as typeof globalThis.fetch)
85		const data = await client.request<QueryResult>(PROJECT_RUNS_QUERY, {
86			projectID: params.projectId,
87			first: PAGE_SIZE,
88			layer: layer ?? undefined,
89			status: status ?? undefined,
90			harness: harness ?? undefined
91		})

7	// The default Playwright harness boots the Go DDx server against a temp copy
8	// of e2e/fixtures/ so the API endpoints exercised by TC-008 (and other
9	// backend-dependent specs) return real data without reading the developer's
10	// $HOME or the repository's live .ddx/ state.

12	const CLI_PKG_DIR = path.resolve(__dirname, '../../..');
13	const FRONTEND_DIR = __dirname;
14	const FIXTURE_DIR = path.resolve(__dirname, 'e2e/fixtures');
15	const PORT = Number(process.env.DDX_E2E_PORT ?? 4174);
16	const BASE_URL = `https://127.0.0.1:${PORT}`;
17	
18	// Build the SvelteKit frontend (so cli/internal/server/embed.go has assets to
19	// embed), copy the fixture workspace into a fresh temp dir, build the ddx
20	// binary from the cli module, and exec it from the temp dir. The temp dir has
21	// no .git so FindProjectRoot falls back to it, and tsnet is disabled so the
22	// harness has no Tailscale dependency.
23	const bootCommand = [
24		`set -e`,
25		`(cd "${FRONTEND_DIR}" && bun run build >&2)`,
26		`TMP=$(mktemp -d -t ddx-e2e-XXXXXX)`,
27		`cp -R "${FIXTURE_DIR}/." "$TMP/"`,
28		`export XDG_DATA_HOME="$TMP/.xdg-data"`,
29		// Build deterministically so VCS metadata does not block fixture boot.
30		`(cd "${CLI_PKG_DIR}" && go build -buildvcs=false -o "$TMP/ddx" .)`,
31		`cd "$TMP"`,
32		`DDX_OPERATOR_PROMPT_ALLOWLIST=localhost exec ./ddx server --tsnet=false --addr=127.0.0.1 --port=${PORT}`
33	].join(' && ');

data.text:
Committed. The bead's scoped changes are in:

- `cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/sessions.spec.ts` rewritten to assert the 302 redirect from `/sessions` to `/runs?layer=run`, preservation of extra query params, and run-row expansion on the redirected page (AC #1).
- `cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/app.spec.ts` TC-005 now asserts the redirect contract instead of the retired Sessions page (AC #3).
- `cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/screenshots.spec.ts` targets `/runs?layer=run` for the `agent` page and `agent-dispatch` marketing entry; the affected PNG baselines were regenerated (AC #2). All sessions/TC-005/agent screenshot grep targets pass locally.
- `lefthook run pre-commit` passes (AC #4).

Broader screenshot failures on unrelated pages (dashboard, beads-kanban, documents, graph, project-overview, plugins, efficacy) are caused by independent layout/height changes and are out of this bead's scope per its NON-SCOPE clause.
